    STATUS    NAME                      EXPRESSION                             TARGETS                        UPDATED
▸   ACTIVE    Engineers to Eng          user.department eq "Engineering"       00g_eng                              —
   INACTIVE   Legacy Eng Mapping        user.title eq "Engineer"               00g_eng                              —
   INVALID    Broken Dept Rule          user.department.unknownField()         00g_sales                            —

[!] 1 rule in INVALID state — expression cannot be evaluated by Okta.
    Open the rule to view why and what to fix.
